intent: Button group container that visually combines related action buttons (toolbars, segmented controls).

blacklist.description: Do not override overflow and positioning

aiPrompt: Use ButtonGroup from @/components/base to visually glue related buttons together (toolbars, segmented controls, split actions). Children should be Buttons of the same size + variant. Internal corners flatten automatically — don't manually `rounded-none` the buttons. Use ButtonGroupSeparator between visually distinct subgroups; ButtonGroupText for inline non-clickable labels.

examples.title: Split action — label + dropdown
examples.snippet:
<ButtonGroup>
  <Button>Save</Button>
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
      <Button variant="default" size="icon"><ChevronDownIcon /></Button>
    </DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
      <DropdownMenuItem>Save as draft</DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem>Save and publish</DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
</ButtonGroup>
